title: sorghastrum pellitum
intro: Sorghastrum pellitum, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Sorghastrum pellitum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
